card_description: Lem is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick synthesizes the "Light Body" and "Re-entry" theories: the Holy Spirit is a collective "Light Creature" (The Fellowship of Christ) that re-enters history through the pineal gland."
